case_title: THE COMSTOCK APARTMENT COMPANY VS. JACK GLASSMAN ET AL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE COMSTOCK APARTMENT COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLASSMAN, JACK AS TRUSTEE OF THE GLASSMAN FAMILY LIVING TRUST DATED NOVEMBER 2, 2001 BARTEL, PEGGY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1333 JONES STREET UNIT 1206, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94104, COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, LEASE FORFEITED, ***JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMESIS INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY, AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY (CODE OF CIV. PROC., 715.010, 1169, AND 1174.3)***; SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
